name: Barbecued Cobb Chicken Salad (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chopped romaine lettuce in the Cayenne Buttermilk dressing.
2. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
3. Top with sliced barbecue chicken, avocado, diced tomatoes, and crumbled blue cheese.
Yield: 4 servings
Busted by Gail Shermeyer  on Jul 12, 97
